root_cause: auto_round W4A16 quantized model has weights in qweight/qzeros/scales format without float .weight parameters, causing accelerate's device dispatch in transformers to fail when attaching hooks to meta-device tensors (inv_freq)
key_error: ValueError: inv_freq is on the meta device, we need a `value` to put in on 0. raised during accelerate dispatch_model attach_align_device_hook_on_blocks after AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained
suggested_fix: This model was quantized with auto_round W4A16 scheme which stores weights as qweight/qzeros/scales buffers without standard .weight parameters. transformers/accelerate device_map='auto' dispatch cannot handle this quantized format. The vLLM backend also fails due to torch._inductor.custom_graph_pass missing (torch 2.10.0 cu121 lacks API added in torch 2.13). Fix requires either: (1) torch upgrade to 2.13+, or (2) re-quantize model with a scheme compatible with transformers native quantized loading (GPTQ/AWQ), or (3) use a different evaluation framework that supports auto_round quantized models directly
